# Chapter 10: Organisational failure  (~120 pp)
- 10.1 Organisations as failure-producing systems (15) · 10.2 Vaughan's normalisation of deviance (15) · 10.3 Production pressure and safety drift (15) · 10.4 Whistleblower dynamics (15) · 10.5 The role of regulator capture (15) · 10.6 Failure section (case in full depth): Challenger and Columbia, Boeing 737 MAX, Bhopal, Chernobyl (45)

**Archetype**: ethics, failure. **Project**: take one major organisational failure; produce a five-page memo on what the engineering profession learned and what it did not. **Exercises**: 15.
